name: Aldric Voss
notes: Test character — Wizard (Evocation) 3. L1-L2 slots, Arcane Recovery, Sculpt Spells.

level1Features.name: Spellcasting
level1Features.description: INT-based prepared caster. Spellbook. Arcane Recovery 1/day.

level1Features.name: Arcane Recovery
level1Features.description: 1/long rest during short rest: recover spell slots totalling up to half Wizard level (1 at level 3). Max recovered slot level ≤ 5.

allFeatures.name: Spellcasting
allFeatures.description: INT-based prepared caster. Learns from spellbook.

allFeatures.name: Arcane Recovery
allFeatures.description: Recover up to 1 spell slot level on short rest (1/long rest).

allFeatures.name: Evocation Savant
allFeatures.description: Copy evocation spells for half cost/time.

allFeatures.name: Sculpt Spells
allFeatures.description: Protect up to 1 + spell-level allies from your evocations; they auto-succeed DEX saves and take no damage on a save.

allFeatures.name: Researcher
allFeatures.description: Know where to find information or who has it.

backgroundFeature: Researcher: You know where to find obscure information or who might have it.
